summary: Frontend testing completed for Owner Wallet date format, notes/branch/source display, Lock icons, and Settings branch edit dialog with External Branch Settings section. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: date format DD/MM/YYYY, notes/branch/source display in Owner Wallet, Lock icons, External Branch Settings section in Settings with all fields (buyer_name, buyer_phone, owner_percentage, monthly_fee), and External Branches page with informational message and 'تعديل الفروع' button.

owner_wallet_date_format.description: Date format DD/MM/YYYY in transactions and history tabs
verified: Deposits show date as 19/02/2026 format
Withdrawals show date in DD/MM/YYYY format
History tab shows dates in DD/MM/YYYY format using toLocaleDateString('en-GB')
📝 emoji visible in transactions tab
📝 emoji visible in history tab
Notes text displayed with blue color styling
🏪 emoji with branch name 'إيداع فرع جادرية' visible in transactions
Branch name displayed in history tab with 'الفرع:' label
💰 emoji with 'المصدر: مبيعات نقدية' visible in history tab
Source labels properly translated (مبيعات نقدية, مبيعات بطاقة, أخرى)

owner_wallet_lock_icons.description: Lock/LockOpen icons used instead of PiggyBank
verified: Lock icon visible in amber 'الخزينة الشخصية' card
LockOpen icon used in 'تحويل للخزينة' button
Lock icon used in history tab for profit transfers

settings_external_branch_section.description: External Branch Settings section in branch edit dialog
verified: 'إعدادات الفرع الخارجي' section header with Store icon visible
Section description text explaining the feature
Switch component with 'فرع مباع' label visible
Switch toggles between checked/unchecked states
Additional fields appear when switch is enabled

settings_sold_branch_fields.description: Fields for buyer_name, buyer_phone, owner_percentage, monthly_fee
verified: 'اسم المشتري/المستفيد' (buyer_name) field visible
'هاتف المشتري' (buyer_phone) field visible
'نسبتك من المبيعات (%)' (owner_percentage) field visible with % symbol
'رسوم شهرية ثابتة (اختياري)' (monthly_fee) field visible
Info box explaining how dues are calculated
Blue info card with AlertCircle icon visible
Message: 'لإضافة فرع مباع، قم بتعديل الفرع من الإعدادات وتفعيل خيار فرع مباع مع تحديد النسبة'
Empty state message also directs to Settings

external_branches_edit_button.description: 'تعديل الفروع' button instead of 'تسجيل فرع مباع'
verified: 'تعديل الفروع' button visible in header with Edit icon
'الذهاب للإعدادات' button visible in empty state
'تسجيل فرع مباع' button NOT present (correctly removed)
